conservative.name: Who's Next?
conservative.requirements: You defeat an enemy while target ally is within close range

success.description: Target ally may perform 1 manoeuvre or the Melee Strike Basic action
Target ally may perform 1 manoeuvre and the Melee Strike Basic action

chaosStar.description: Target ally adds to his dice pool for any action granted to him by this action

sigmarsComet.description: Target ally may use any Melee Attack action card in place of the Melee Strike

reckless.name: Who's Next?
reckless.requirements: You defeat an enemy in melee combat and another enemy is within close range

challenge.description: Effect: If you defeat an enemy while another enemy is within close range, you may suffer 1 fatigue and place 4 recharge tokens on this card to immediately manoeuvre to engaged with that enemy and attempting the Melee Strike Basic action against him. Add to your dice pool for that action. You must choose the closest enemy if there are multiple suitable targets for this action
